name: Pip Filter
description: Compact 2-pole 12dB/oct lowpass filter with resonance, pingable trigger input, and built-in VCA normalled open. Self-oscillates with rough 1V/oct tracking from the second frequency input.

controls.description: Attenuverter for the first frequency CV input. Scales CV positively or negatively around the manual Freq setting.
controls.detail: full CCW: invert · noon: zero · full CW: unity

controls.name: Freq
controls.description: Manual cutoff frequency. Summed with both CV inputs.

controls.name: Res
controls.description: Manual resonance. Peaks signal just around the cutoff, reaches self-oscillation near full CW.
controls.detail: no CV input · self-osc approximately tracks V/oct from Freq CV 2

inputs.name: -/+ (Freq CV 1)
inputs.description: First frequency CV input with attenuverter. Summed with knob and second CV.

inputs.name: Freq (CV 2)
inputs.description: Second frequency CV input. Wider range, roughly tracks 1V/oct when self-oscillating.

inputs.name: Trig
inputs.description: Pings the filter to produce a plucked/percussive tone. Rising-edge only to prevent double pings from longer gates.
inputs.voltage: rising-edge trigger · resonance must be just below self-osc to hear ping

inputs.name: VCA
inputs.description: CV for the built-in VCA. Controls output level independently of cutoff.

outputs.name: Out
outputs.description: Audio output post filter and post VCA.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillation as sine source
behaviors.trigger: Res at full CW, no audio input
behaviors.description: With resonance near maximum the filter oscillates into a sine wave even without audio input. Pitch follows the Freq knob plus both CV inputs. Freq CV 2 provides rough 1V/oct for a crude but usable sine VCO.

behaviors.name: Ping mode
behaviors.trigger: trigger → Trig (with Res just below self-osc)
behaviors.description: A trigger into Trig excites the resonant peak, producing a decaying plucked/sine-burst tone with no audio input needed. Resonance setting determines decay length — closer to self-osc = longer ring. Rising-edge detection prevents double pings from long gates.

behaviors.name: Normalled-open VCA
behaviors.description: The built-in VCA stays fully open when nothing is patched into its CV jack, so the module behaves as a plain filter by default. Patching a CV (envelope, LFO) adds amplitude control without requiring an external VCA.

behaviors.name: Attenuverter offset via Freq CV 1
behaviors.description: The first frequency input has a built-in attenuverter, letting the same modulation source open or close the filter depending on knob position. Useful for inverting envelope polarity or scaling a bipolar LFO into a narrow sweep range.

behaviors.name: Dual-input frequency summing
behaviors.description: Freq knob, attenuverted CV 1, and raw CV 2 (1V/oct) all sum to set cutoff. Lets pitch tracking (CV 2) coexist with modulation (CV 1) without an external mixer — useful for a self-oscillating sine VCO that also accepts vibrato.

patchIdeas.name: Pinged percussion voice
patchIdeas.patch: Res just below self-osc · clock → Trig · Freq knob sets pitch · output is a decaying plucked tone with no audio input · attach envelope → VCA CV to add amplitude shaping
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pip Filter:
* Res: just below self-osc
* Freq: sets pitch

Clock:

Envelope:

- Clock (Out) t> Pip Filter (Trig) // pings resonant peak
- Envelope (Out) >> Pip Filter (VCA) // amplitude shape
- Pip Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Rough sine VCO
patchIdeas.patch: Res fully CW → self-oscillates · Sequencer V/oct → Freq CV 2 · output is sine following pitch · use Freq CV 1 (attenuverter) for vibrato LFO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pip Filter:
* Res: full CW (self-osc)
* -/+: ~2 o'clock

Sequencer:

LFO:

- Sequencer (V/oct) p> Pip Filter (Freq)
- LFO (Out) >> Pip Filter (-/+) // attenuverted vibrato
- Pip Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Ducked filter sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Audio → In · envelope → VCA CV (ducks volume under filter sweep) · LFO → Freq CV 1 attenuverted for bipolar cutoff modulation · built-in VCA saves a dedicated VCA module
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pip Filter:
* Freq: ~noon
* Res: moderate
* -/+: ~1 o'clock

VCO:

LFO:

Envelope:

- VCO (Out) -> Pip Filter (In)
- LFO (Out) >> Pip Filter (-/+) // bipolar cutoff sweep
- Envelope (Out) >> Pip Filter (VCA) // amp shape in-module
- Pip Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-patched resonance drone
patchIdeas.patch: Res full CW · slow LFO → Freq CV 1 attenuverted · no audio input · drifting sine drone at sub-audio to mid frequencies · excellent for ambient or modulating bass
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pip Filter:
* Res: full CW
* Freq: low-mid range
* -/+: ~1 o'clock

LFO:

- LFO (Out) >> Pip Filter (-/+) // slow drift
- Pip Filter (Out) -> Mixer (In) // sine drone

patchIdeas.name: Pluck with pitched ping
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer V/oct → Freq CV 2 · Res just below self-osc · trigger pattern → Trig · filter pings in tune with sequence · no VCO needed · acoustic-like plucked melody
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pip Filter:
* Res: just below self-osc
* Freq: tuned to A2

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (V/oct) p> Pip Filter (Freq)
- Sequencer (Gate) t> Pip Filter (Trig) // pitched plucks
- Pip Filter (Out) -> Reverb (In)
